goal: Enable a customer and a professional to exchange basic in-platform messages tied to a lead, with minimal moderation and safety controls.
inScope: One-to-one threads between customer and professional
Thread is created from an existing lead/contact request
Ordered message history within each thread
Unread indicator + last-message preview in thread list
Basic email notification for new unread message
Basic moderation actions: report message, block sender, admin hide message
moderationAndSafetyConstraints: Only participants in a conversation can read or send messages in that conversation
Messages are immutable in MVP (no sender edits/deletes), except admin hide
Rate limit sends per user (example: max 20 messages / 5 minutes) to reduce spam
Block action immediately prevents future messages from blocked sender in that conversation
Report action is available per message and stores reason + audit trail
Admin can hide a message from both participants without deleting audit data
Basic server-side content checks: reject empty body, oversized body, and obvious script/html injection
acceptanceCriteria: A conversation is auto-created from a lead and both sides can exchange text messages
Thread list shows latest message preview and unread state for each participant
Opening a thread marks unread messages as read for the viewer
Users cannot access conversations where they are not a participant
Blocked sender cannot send additional messages in blocked conversation
Reported message appears in admin moderation queue with reason and timestamp
All MVP messaging JSON schemas remain valid and parseable
